title: Entity Move Towards Home Restriction Behavior
description:
Allows entities with a `minecraft:home` component to move towards their home position. 
		If `restriction_radius` is set, entities will be able to run this behavior only if outside of it.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• elder_guardian: 5

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: This multiplier modifies the entity's speed when moving towards its restriction.
